title: euphorbia segetalis subsp. pinea
intro: Euphorbia segetalis subsp. pinea, also known as pine spurge or pine medick, is a plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family, specifically a subspecies of Euphorbia segetalis. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its sap and roots. The health benefits of Euphorbia segetalis subsp. pinea include reducing inflammation and fighting infections, making it a potential treatment for various skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Euphorbia segetalis subsp. pinea typically involve its sap being extracted and applied topically, or being used in infusions and decoctions for internal use.
